wordplay_note: Roger's wife who has an affair
card_description: Virginia Lindahl is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Puttering About in a Small Land*. Roger's wife whose dissatisfaction drives the novel. Name note: Roger's wife who has an affair. Suburban discontent — the realistic precursor to PKD's cosmic alienation. First appears in *Puttering About in a Small Land*.
